TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Ad-Rock, title = Ad-Rock, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ad-Rock} }

S.FORM: kawas tay 1966, ryax sa tay 31 nqu tay 10, Ad-Rock, squliq na Bunge'. Ad-Rock, minkahul sa New York na Amirika, cyugal mtsswe kwara qutux ngasal nya. Ad-Rock hiya ga m' Engi. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors qyanux na sraral bincyogun nya 1982 kawas,iwal qanux na mlikuy (Beasite boys) knalay qhuniq na tlubuw John Barry shrriq ingak.trang mopu tzyu kawas Horovitz lga hiya syugaw la. qyanux nya 1980 kawas ga mluw qutux Amirika na Molly Ringwald blaq na rangi. 1992 kawas ga Ioni Skye kekong la. 1995 kawas inisqung sazing hi nha ru 1999 kawas likong.tehok 1997 kawas mluw qutux kneril lozi ru 2006 ga kawas wal kekong lozi. 2008 kawas 11 byacing Ad-Rock ga bnaziy qutux hopa balay ru betunux balay ngnsal maki beh City of South Pasadena qasa.

kawas tay 1966, ryax sa tay 31 nqu tay 10, Ad-Rock, squliq na Bunge'. Ad-Rock, minkahul sa New York na Amirika, cyugal mtsswe kwara qutux ngasal nya. Ad-Rock hiya ga m' Engi. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors qyanux na sraral bincyogun nya 1982 kawas,iwal qanux na mlikuy (Beasite boys) knalay qhuniq na tlubuw John Barry shrriq ingak.trang mopu tzyu kawas Horovitz lga hiya syugaw la. qyanux nya 1980 kawas ga mluw qutux Amirika na Molly Ringwald blaq na rangi. 1992 kawas ga Ioni Skye kekong la. 1995 kawas inisqung sazing hi nha ru 1999 kawas likong.tehok 1997 kawas mluw qutux kneril lozi ru 2006 ga kawas wal kekong lozi. 2008 kawas 11 byacing Ad-Rock ga bnaziy qutux hopa balay ru betunux balay ngnsal maki beh City of South Pasadena qasa.
S.PHON: kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, a*-roʦ~ʨk, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. a*-roʦ~ʨk, minkaħul s~ɕa new jork na amirika, ʦ~ʨjuɣal mts~ɕs~ɕwe kwara qutux ŋas~ɕal nja. a*-roʦ~ʨk ħija ɣa mʔ eŋi. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ qjanux na s~ɕraral βinʦ~ʨjoɣun nja **** kawas~ɕ,iwal qanux na mlikuj (βeas~ɕite βojs~ɕ) knalaj qħuniq na tluβuw *oħn βarrj s~ɕħrriq iŋak.traŋ mopu tzju kawas~ɕ ħoro*itz lɣa ħija s~ɕjuɣaw la. qjanux nja **** kawas~ɕ ɣa mluw qutux amirika na mollj riŋwal* βlaq na raŋi. **** kawas~ɕ ɣa ioni s~ɕkje kekoŋ la. **** kawas~ɕ inis~ɕquŋ s~ɕaziŋ ħi nħa ru **** kawas~ɕ likoŋ.teħok **** kawas~ɕ mluw qutux kneril lozi ru **** ɣa kawas~ɕ wal kekoŋ lozi. **** kawas~ɕ ** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ a*-roʦ~ʨk ɣa βnazij qutux ħopa βalaj ru βetunux βalaj ŋns~ɕal maki βeħ ʦ~ʨitj o* s~ɕoutħ pas~ɕa*ena qas~ɕa.
